name: RPlog_The_Mysterious_Ms._Starling
title: The Mysterious Ms. Starling
summary: At the Imperial base camp beside Corellia's Corona House, the advisor Danik Kreldin oversees the hunt for a Rebel Lambda-class shuttle that slipped through the Imperial fleet. His operation is interrupted by a disheveled, furious woman in black who gives only the name Starling, wielding high-level access codes to bully her way to the senior officer. Recognizing her as the advisor Sinestra from the Trandosha expedition, Danik discovers she is hunting the very same ship, the Ensorceled, stolen years ago by the escaped Jedi Aurejin. Sinestra reveals the Jedi traveled with a woman named Mira Isaria, whom she claims as her own, and using uncanny abilities she hijacks a CorSec terminal to race through docking-bay surveillance and pinpoint the shuttle's location. She orders Aurejin destroyed on sight but Mira taken alive, and demands recovered crates be returned to her. As she departs, Danik resolves to investigate Starling further, and Imperial records reveal she once appeared, younger and elegant, on the arm of the Emperor himself.
